name: d360_query_sql
description: Execute a Data 360 SQL query through /ssot/query-sql.
tips: Always bound broad queries with LIMIT or a trace/session/id predicate.

name: d360_data_spaces_list
description: List Data 360 data spaces.

name: d360_dmo_describe
description: Describe one Data Model Object by API name.

name: d360_dlo_describe
description: Describe one Data Lake Object by API name.

name: d360_segments_list
description: List segments with optional pagination.

name: d360_activations_list
description: List activations with optional pagination.

name: d360_calculated_insights_list
description: List calculated insights.

name: d360_connectors_list
description: List connector catalog entries supported by the org.

name: d360_connections_sfdc_list
description: List Salesforce CRM connections.

name: d360_data_streams_list
description: List data streams with optional pagination.

name: d360_data_transforms_list
description: List Data 360 SQL/data transforms.

name: d360_data_actions_list
description: List Data 360 data actions.

name: d360_identity_resolutions_list
description: List identity resolution rulesets.

name: d360_semantic_models_list
description: List semantic data models.

name: d360_search_indexes_list
description: List search indexes when the org exposes the search-index surface.
tips: Some orgs expose this surface only after search indexes are provisioned.

name: d360_retrievers_list
description: List machine-learning retrievers when retriever APIs are provisioned.
tips: Can return not-found when retriever APIs are not provisioned; do not use as a core readiness gate.

name: d360_datakits_list
description: List available DataKits.

name: d360_query_sql_status
description: Poll a Data 360 SQL query status.

name: d360_query_sql_rows
description: Fetch rows for a completed Data 360 SQL query.

name: d360_metadata_entities
description: List metadata entities by entity type.

name: d360_metadata_get
description: Fetch metadata for a specific entity name.

name: d360_dmo_list
description: List Data Model Objects.

name: d360_dmo_get
description: Get one Data Model Object schema.

name: d360_dlo_list
description: List Data Lake Objects.

name: d360_dlo_get
description: Get one Data Lake Object schema.

name: d360_dmo_mapping_list
description: List DLO-to-DMO mappings. Prefer filtering by DMO or source object.

name: d360_dmo_mapping_get
description: Get one DLO-to-DMO mapping configuration.

name: d360_datastream_list
description: List data streams.

name: d360_datastream_get
description: Get one data stream configuration.

name: d360_connection_list
description: List connections for a connector type.

name: d360_connection_get
description: Get one connection by id.

name: d360_connector_list
description: List supported connector types.

name: d360_connector_metadata
description: Get connector metadata by connector catalog name.

name: d360_connection_endpoints
description: List pre-configured connection endpoints.

name: d360_segment_get
description: Get one segment by id.

name: d360_activation_get
description: Get one activation by id.

name: d360_activation_target_list
description: List activation targets.

name: d360_activation_target_get
description: Get one activation target by id.

name: d360_ci_get
description: Get one calculated insight by API name.

name: d360_ci_run_status
description: Get calculated insight run status.

name: d360_ir_get
description: Get one identity resolution ruleset by id.

name: d360_transform_list
description: List data transforms.

name: d360_transform_get
description: Get one data transform.

name: d360_transform_schedule_get
description: Get one data transform schedule.

name: d360_dataaction_list
description: List data actions.

name: d360_dataaction_get
description: Get one data action.

name: d360_dataaction_target_list
description: List data action targets.

name: d360_dataaction_target_get
description: Get one data action target.

name: d360_semantic_model_get
description: Get one semantic data model.

name: d360_semantic_model_validate
description: Validate one semantic data model.

name: d360_search_index_list
description: List search indexes.

name: d360_search_index_get
description: Get one search index by API name or id.

name: d360_retriever_get
description: Get one machine-learning retriever by id or name.

name: d360_datakit_get
description: Get one DataKit by id.

name: d360_datakit_manifest
description: Get DataKit manifest by id.

name: d360_datakit_deploy_status
description: Get DataKit deployment job status.

name: d360_datakit_components
description: List components for one DataKit.

name: d360_datakit_component_status
description: Get component deployment status for one DataKit component.

name: d360_datakit_component_deps
description: Get dependencies for one DataKit component.

name: d360_profile_metadata
description: Discover profile schema.

name: d360_profile_metadata_model
description: Discover one profile DMO schema and relationships.

name: d360_profile_query
description: Query profile records for a data model. Requires profile filter params.

name: d360_insights_metadata
description: Discover calculated insight metadata.

name: d360_insights_metadata_get
description: Discover one calculated insight metadata definition.

name: d360_insights_query
description: Query calculated insight rows.

name: d360_datagraph_metadata
description: List data graph metadata.

name: d360_datagraph_query
description: Query data graph records for an entity.

name: d360_metadata_search
description: Search Data 360 metadata using natural language.
tips: Use for discovery when compact catalogs are not enough. Include a metadataType filter when possible. If the response is PRISM_RUNTIME_ERROR and mentions msr_metadata_index__dlm, the org search plane is unindexed; fall back to d360_metadata_entities or d360_metadata list/describe.

name: d360_ci_validate
description: Validate calculated insight SQL before create/update.
tips: Validate before creating or updating calculated insights.

name: d360_transform_validate
description: Validate Data Transform configuration before create/update.
tips: Validation can return precise STL graph issues such as missing target DLOs.

name: d360_connection_test
description: Test connection configuration without saving it.
tips: Pass connectorType/method and connector parameters in the body; this does not create a connection.

name: d360_semantic_query
description: Execute a semantic data model query.
tips: Semantic queries use /semantic-engine/gateway, not /ssot/query-sql.

name: d360_ci_create
description: Create a calculated insight. Validate the payload before create.
tips: Run d360_ci_validate first. apiName must end with __cio.

name: d360_ci_update
description: Update a calculated insight by API name.
tips: Validate changes before update; updates can trigger recompilation.

name: d360_ci_run
description: Run a calculated insight calculation.

name: d360_ci_enable
description: Enable a calculated insight.

name: d360_ci_disable
description: Disable a calculated insight.

name: d360_segment_create
description: Create a segment. Validate DMO/CI fields and payload shape before create.
tips: Verify DMO/CI fields first. Prefer dry_run before create. Segment payload shapes can vary by definition type.

name: d360_segment_update
description: Update a segment by id.
tips: Use dry_run first; changing a segment can affect downstream activations.

name: d360_segment_publish
description: Publish/calculate segment membership by id.
tips: Publishing can start asynchronous membership calculation. Inspect segment status before and after.

name: d360_segment_deactivate
description: Deactivate a segment by API name.
tips: Deactivate uses segment API/developer name, not always the internal id.

name: d360_activation_create
description: Create an activation. Requires an active segment and an activation target.
tips: Requires an active segment and a valid activation target. Use dry_run first.

name: d360_activation_update
description: Update an activation by id.
tips: Use dry_run first; updating activations can affect downstream delivery.

name: d360_activation_target_create
description: Create an activation target. Must reference a valid destination/connection shape.
tips: Must reference a valid connection/connector target. Use dry_run first.

name: d360_activation_target_update
description: Update an activation target by id.
tips: Use dry_run first; activation target changes can affect downstream delivery.

name: d360_transform_create
description: Create a data transform. Schedule runs separately.
tips: Validate first with d360_transform_validate, then dry_run the create request before execution.

name: d360_transform_update
description: Update a data transform by id.
tips: Use dry_run first; changing a transform can affect generated DLO/DMO data.

name: d360_transform_run
description: Run a data transform manually.
tips: Manual runs can consume org resources and update transform outputs. Use dry_run first.

name: d360_transform_schedule_set
description: Set or update the schedule for a data transform.
tips: Use dry_run first; schedule changes can trigger recurring downstream processing.

name: d360_dataaction_create
description: Create a data action. Requires a configured data action target.
tips: Create or verify a data action target first. Use dry_run before execution.

name: d360_dataaction_target_create
description: Create a data action target for event-triggered payload delivery.
tips: Data action targets are for event-triggered payloads, not segment activation targets. Use dry_run first.

name: d360_dataaction_target_update
description: Update a data action target by id.
tips: Use dry_run first; endpoint, credential, or payload changes can affect event delivery.

name: d360_retriever_list
description: List RAG retrievers with optional filters.
tips: Use this to find retriever API names before create/update/configuration work.

name: d360_retriever_create
description: Create a RAG retriever.
tips: Call d360_search_index_list first to find source search indexes. Use dry_run before execution.

name: d360_retriever_update
description: Update a RAG retriever label or description.
tips: Use dry_run first; updates change retriever metadata used by downstream RAG flows.

name: d360_retriever_config_list
description: List configurations for a retriever.

name: d360_retriever_config_get
description: Get a retriever configuration by id or name.

name: d360_retriever_config_create
description: Create a new retriever configuration version.
tips: For NoCode configurations, provide input, outputFields, numberOfResults, and isActive. Use dry_run first.

name: d360_retriever_config_update
description: Update a retriever configuration, such as active status.
tips: At most one configuration can be active within a retriever. Use dry_run first.

name: d360_search_index_config
description: Get valid search index configuration options.
tips: Call this before creating or updating a search index to discover valid config ids.

name: d360_search_index_process_history
description: Get process run history for a search index.
tips: The upstream MCP notes offset is 1-based and pagination may be unreliable.

name: d360_search_index_create
description: Create a semantic search index for RAG/vector search.
tips: Call d360_search_index_config first and use its supported config ids. Use dry_run before execution.

name: d360_search_index_update
description: Update a semantic search index by API name or id.
tips: Call d360_search_index_config and d360_search_index_get first. Use dry_run before execution.

name: d360_datastream_create
description: Create a generic data stream. Connector-specific create operations provide safer payload templates.
tips: Prefer connector-specific create operations when possible. Verify the connection, source fields, DLO shape, and mappings first; then dry_run before execution.

name: d360_datastream_update
description: Update a data stream by id or name.
tips: Use dry_run first; updates affect future ingestion runs. Avoid sending read-only fields returned by get.

name: d360_datastream_run
description: Trigger a manual ingestion run for a data stream.
tips: Salesforce CRM data streams cannot be manually triggered; use for S3, Snowflake, file upload, and other non-CRM streams. Dry-run first.

name: d360_datastream_create_sfdc
description: Create a Salesforce CRM data stream payload against /ssot/data-streams.
tips: Call d360_connection_list with connectorType=SalesforceDotCom first and use the selected connection alias. Engagement streams require eventDateTimeFieldName.

name: d360_datastream_create_aws_s3
description: Create an AWS S3 data stream payload against /ssot/data-streams.
tips: Call d360_connection_list with connectorType=AwsS3 first. Verify file parser attributes, source fields, DLO fields, mappings, and refresh config before execution.

name: d360_datastream_create_snowflake
description: Create a Snowflake-backed data stream payload against /ssot/data-streams.
tips: Use an existing Snowflake connection. Verify database, schema, object, DLO fields, primary key, mappings, and refresh mode before execution.

name: d360_dmo_create
description: Create a Data Model Object. Do not include the __dlm suffix in the name.
tips: Do not include the __dlm suffix in body.name. Include at least one primary key field; Engagement DMOs require eventDateTimeFieldName. Use dry_run first.

name: d360_dmo_update
description: Update a Data Model Object by API name.
tips: Use dry_run first; DMO changes can affect mappings, calculated insights, segments, and downstream activations.

name: d360_dlo_create
description: Create a Data Lake Object.
tips: Data streams usually create DLOs automatically. Verify fields, category, dataspace, and primary key before execution; use dry_run first.

name: d360_dlo_update
description: Update a Data Lake Object by API name.
tips: Use dry_run first; DLO schema changes can affect data streams, mappings, and search indexes.

name: d360_dmo_mapping_create
description: Create a DLO-to-DMO mapping.
tips: Call d360_dlo_get and d360_dmo_get first to verify exact source/target field API names and types. Use dry_run first.

name: d360_dmo_mapping_update
description: Update a DLO-to-DMO mapping by developer name.
tips: Use dry_run first; mapping changes affect future ingestion into the target DMO.

name: d360_dmo_field_mapping_add
description: Add field mappings to an existing DLO-to-DMO object mapping.
tips: Call d360_dmo_mapping_get first, then add only verified source/target field names. Use dry_run first.
